database.db module¶

Database Module¶

This module handles the SQLAlchemy engine initialization, session management, and database schema creation.

database.db.get_db()[source]¶

Dependency provider for database sessions.

Yields a database session to be used in FastAPI dependencies. Ensures the session is closed after the request is finished.

Yields:

SQLAlchemy Session object.

Return type:

Generator[Session, None, None]

database.db.init_db()[source]¶

Initializes the database by creating all defined tables.

This function uses the SQLAlchemy Base metadata to generate the schema in the database connected via the current engine.

Returns:

None
